claims.statement: The implementation adds one transactional retained-evidence-to-crown authority, explicit stack-transition events, global relative-improvement reward projection, and append-only fail-closed weight publication state.
The retained GitHub receipt records successful evidence and CodeQL checks for the implementation head.

exit_criteria.statement: Only a retained qualified PASS with exact arena, target, stack, tree, report, finalized-priority, and evidence bindings can produce a settlement transition and reward claim.
All active arena claims are reopened and normalized in one deterministic projection; any missing, orphaned, or invalid arena authority holds the whole projection.
Weight publication journals intent before SDK use and remains pending or held until exact authoritative metagraph readback confirms the projected sparse weights.
No green exact-final-head full-suite receipt exists; the predecessor-head broad run retained one import-order failure and its raw log is unavailable.
The repository-retained GitHub receipt binds successful evidence checks to the implementation head.
